title: Reconstruction
story: [Meridian-7 Log #020] Final step: reconstruct the complete communication log. Each log entry follows the format [HH:MM:SS] LEVEL: message, where LEVEL is INFO/WARN/ERROR. You need to extract all valid log entries from the damaged data, reconstruct the communication record, then package it as a distress signal to send to rEx. This is the decisive step.
promptChallenge: [Target] Log lines shaped as [HH:MM:SS] LEVEL: message.
hints: [Hint] Log lines have a fixed format structure
[Hint] The timestamp is in square brackets, following HH:MM:SS format
[Hint] LEVEL can only be INFO, WARN, or ERROR
promptHints: Describe each component of the log step by step
Use a structured template: [time] level: message
Provide concrete examples to help AI understand the format

feedback.onPass: [Distress Signal Sent] Chapter Four complete. Communication log reconstructed, distress signal packaged and transmitted.
feedback.onFail: [Parse Failed] Log reconstruction failed. Multiple components need simultaneous constraints.
feedback.onPerfect: [Distress Signal Sent] Communication log reconstruction complete. Meridian-7's coordinates, status, distress message — all packaged in rEx protocol format and transmitted. Now, wait.
feedback.onDirectWrite: [Manual Override] Manual log reconstruction. Chapter Four — transmission protocol fully mastered.
